text.title: Vendor Margin Defense Procedure
text.summary: Five-step Friday end-of-week procedure: scan → classify → quantify → alert → draft. Each step gates the next.

step.name: scan-time-log
step.input: Last 7 days of time-log (Harvest/Toggl export) + Slack/email thread + SOW
step.action: Run `time-log-pattern-scan`. For each of the 6 patterns identify candidate entries. Exclude rows tagged `SALES_INVESTMENT`.

step.name: classify-patterns
step.action: Run `pattern-classification`. Reclassify gold_plating items in {accessibility, security, performance} as `value_add` (not bleed). Reclassify rework with `QA_ITERATION` tag as normal. Confirm ai_rework_loop only when same task billed >= 3 times.
step.output: Confirmed bleed list with `pattern_id` per item

step.name: quantify-bleed
step.action: Run `bleed-quantification`. For each bleed compute `hours_or_dollars` and `severity_pct_of_margin`. Sum to `cumulative_bleed_pct`.

step.name: alert-decision
step.action: If any bleed > 5% OR cumulative > 10% OR realised margin < 0, emit alert with `due_by = trigger + 48 business hours`.
step.decision-gate: If no alerts, skip to step 5 with `comms_drafted: false`.

step.name: draft-comms
step.action: Run `client-message-draft`. Concrete numbers in body, diplomatic in salutation. Soften vocabulary tokens {minor, slight, just, small} are forbidden when bleed > 5%.
step.decision-gate: Human reviews each drafted message before sending. Auto-send is forbidden.
